atk1-text: Roll Venom + TR vs. STR + SR against an adjacent Insect. The target gains Wounds and Poisoned for each Net Success.
atk2-text: Roll Heat + TR vs. SPE + TR against an adjacent Insect. The target gains Wounds and Burns for each Net Success.
atk3-text: Roll Swarming + TR and choose a Hex within Swarming Hexes. Each Insect within one Hex rolls SPE + SR to Resist, then gains Wounds and Immobile for each Net Success. Lose one Swarms or DIE.
atk4-text: Roll SPE + TR vs. SPE + TR against an adjacent Insect. For each Net Success, the target gains Wounds and you may move that many Hexes.
